title: Best New Artist Predictions from RANGE
text: Olivia Dean is expected to win Best New Artist, described as talented, tasteful, and just well-lit enough to be widely acknowledged without raising eyebrows. The nominees include Olivia Dean, KATSEYE, The Marías, Addison Rae, Sombr, Leon Thomas, Alex Warren, and Lola Young. The category functions as a carefully selected snapshot of whom the Academy feels it can endorse without triggering too many eyes rolling. Addison Rae represents the tension between viral momentum and traditional gatekeeping, while others occupy critically acceptable but not institutionally urgent territory. One noteworthy omission emphasized the absurdity at the heart of this category: what counts as new is less about timing or talent than about who the Academy is willing to officially canonize.
